tweet.text:
宇宙データセンターの仕組みは？

無制限の太陽光発電と自然真空冷却で稼働する軌道上AIスーパークラスター。

1. 軌道展開と打ち上げ
ロケットと衛星が計算ノードを低軌道に運ぶ。
ティッカー: $RKLB · $RDW · $LUNR · $PL

2. 電源システム（太陽光 + エネルギー管理）
巨大な太陽光パネルアレイが絶え間ない日光を収集し、先進的な電力分配を行う。
ティッカー: $NVDA · $GOOGL · $PL · $RKLB

3. 熱および冷却管理
宇宙の真空における受動的放射冷却 — ファンや冷却装置は不要。
ティッカー: $NVDA · $AMD · $HPE · $RDW

4. 計算ハードウェアとAI統合
放射線耐性GPU、TPU、および機上AI処理クラスタ。
ティッカー: $NVDA · $AMD · $GOOGL · $HPE

5. データ接続性とネットワーキング
レーザー衛星間リンクと地上局への高速ダウンリンク。
ティッカー: $ASTS · $VSAT · $IRDM · $RKLB

宇宙データセンターは浮遊するAIスーパークラスター — 計算を軌道に移すことで、地球の電力、冷却、土地の制約を解決。
それが、打ち上げ、ハードウェア、宇宙インフラのリーダーである$NVDA、$RKLB、$ASTS、$GOOGL、SpaceXが、次のAI勝者の波として位置づけられている理由です。

profile_bio.description: 世界中から情報収集&データ分析😎/SAOを見てAI、メタバースに興味を持つ→他業種から異世界転生→ 💻データサイエンティスト、AIエンジニア→起業家/📈投資家：株のAI自動売買ツール開発中/未来人🚪/お酒、肉、旅行好き🥺🍺✌️うけぴー 🍀人の行く裏に道あり花の山

quoted_tweet.text:
How Space Data Centers Work?

Orbital AI superclusters running on unlimited solar power and natural vacuum cooling.

1. Orbital Deployment & Launch
Rockets and satellites delivering compute nodes into low-Earth orbit.
Tickers: $RKLB · $RDW · $LUNR · $PL

2. Power Systems (Solar + Energy Management)
Massive solar arrays harvesting constant sunlight with advanced power distribution.
Tickers: $NVDA · $GOOGL · $PL · $RKLB

3. Thermal & Cooling Management
Passive radiation cooling in the vacuum of space — no fans or chillers needed.
Tickers: $NVDA · $AMD · $HPE · $RDW

4. Compute Hardware & AI Integration
Radiation-hardened GPUs, TPUs, and onboard AI processing clusters.
Tickers: $NVDA · $AMD · $GOOGL · $HPE

5. Data Connectivity & Networking
Laser inter-satellite links and high-speed downlink to ground stations.
Tickers: $ASTS · $VSAT · $IRDM · $RKLB

Space data centers are floating AI superclusters — solving Earth’s power, cooling, and land limits by moving compute into orbit.
That’s why leaders in launch, hardware, and space infrastructure $NVDA, $RKLB, $ASTS, $GOOGL, SpaceX are positioned as the next wave of AI winners.

tweet.text:
Space theme - $RKLB $BKSY $LUNR $FLY

As I keep saying - don’t rely on a single metric to make decisions

Many assumed losing the 21 EMA meant the trend was over

What matters: are they holding VWAP? Are they respecting the daily/weekly trend?

$RKLB held VWAP from ATHs
$BKSY fakeout → held VWAP from recent lows
$LUNR $FLY showing similar behavior

Zoom out, identify the trend, size accordingly, and sit tight

Funny part - someone was upset a few days ago when space names pulled back… and try to say something about me and the post is deleted today 😂😂

and I agree space theme is not an easy names to hold - it's volatile and they are volatile for a reason!

tweet.text:
PORTFOLIO UPDATE 4/29
$LUNR   $QBTS   $ORCL   $TSLA   $XYZ   $MU   $CAVA   $CAVA   $ARM   $BE   $IBIT   $GEV   $VRT   $VRT   $CAT   $NBIS   $NBIS

Alright, FOMC & Megas earnings day! I hope you had fun. 

Gameplan remains the same...playing this pullback as an opportunity to get myself into good exposure for a potential re-confirmation of the uptrend. Again, it's not about prediction, but when I see an historical uptrend from the lows, I am a buyer of the first initial pullback by targeting the leading names & groups at their 21dma-structure. It can fail, but with price still above a rising 21dma-structure on QQQ, breadth going sideways and MCO hitting oversold this morning, internals VIX/CS rejected at declining 21dma-structure, I want to keep a bird-view on this trend and engage in this opportunity. 

Mega-caps earnings are coming soft post-market, so this could change that picture, and in which case I played the odds in front of me, and I will manage risk tomorrow. That's the game.

NER at 2.5%, and will allow myself to push up to 3% tomorrow if the setups are there. OH at 8%, and Still have a good +14.38% cushion on this market cycle, allowing me to see this pullback as an opportunity and not as a threat. 

Let's see if we can get stabilization after today's initial momentum, but I like both Credit Spreads and VIX action below their declining 21dma-structure, along with ST breadth that really cooled off in the last few days. Let's see! day by day. 

Cheers HAGN!

$NVDA, $INTL, $AAOI, $SIVE, $SOI, $MU, $SNDK, $RMBS, $LPK, $IQE, $ALMU

tweet.text:
🚨How To Invest In SpaceX Before IPO??

2 Focussed ETFs are $XOVR $NASA 

1/ $NASA is a ‘core’ focussed Space ETF with key holdings in SpaceX and important Space companies including $RKLB $PL $LUNR and Filtronic PLC. 

2/ $XOVR : ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF holds a significant position in SpaceX, though not direct ownership of shares. 
As of April 2026, the fund provides indirect, pre-IPO exposure to SpaceX, with reports indicating a ~10% to over 40% allocation at different points via special purpose vehicles (SPVs)
